request.brief: Assemble a 60-minute short-drama anthology block from Omeleto reserve titles: emotional pivots, cinematic silence, and twist endings for 25-44 viewers.

response.channel_brief_interpretation: A 60-minute anthology block from Omeleto reserve shorts — each slot lands on an emotional pivot or twist, with cinematic pacing for 25-44 viewers who expect tension, silence, and payoff.

lineup.title: Public misunderstanding
lineup.programming_rationale: Slot 1 of 7 sequences "Public misunderstanding" from Ep 2 into the The Reserve (Omeleto) FAST block. Lizzie Bennet, Lydia Bennet drive the moment: Editorially, "Public misunderstanding" is the pivot of Ep 2: Lizzie Bennet and Lydia Bennet drive the embarrassment → anger arc.  Commenters twist Lizzie's words; Lydia fans the flames instead of defending her sister. Placed here to sustain prime-time energy across the 60-minute lineup.
lineup.lead_in_note: Cold open: drop viewers into "Public misunderstanding" with Lizzie Bennet, Lydia Bennet at peak stakes in Ep 2.
lineup.lead_out_note: Sets up "Romantic DM" in Ep 1 by leaving Lizzie Bennet in unresolved tension.
